'''Prildaz''' was the [[Yevetha]]n name of the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[ILC-905 system]] in the [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sector]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]]. It was a barren dustball [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] [[Black Nine]]. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] defeated the Yevethan defense of Black Nine.

{{Planet-stub}}
